summary: Comprehensive testing of Account Mappings CRUD module completed. All backend APIs working correctly (100% success rate). Frontend fully functional with proper navigation, filtering, CRUD operations, and responsive design.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/v1/account-mappings - list all mappings (found 6 existing)
✅ Backend: GET /api/v1/account-mappings?cnpj=xxx - filter by CNPJ (correctly filtered 6 items)
✅ Backend: GET /api/v1/account-mappings/cnpjs - list CNPJs (found 1 CNPJ)
✅ Backend: POST /api/v1/account-mappings - create new mapping (successfully created)
✅ Backend: GET /api/v1/account-mappings/{id} - get specific mapping (retrieved correctly)
✅ Backend: PUT /api/v1/account-mappings/{id} - update mapping (updated successfully)
✅ Backend: PUT /api/v1/account-mappings/bulk/update - bulk update (updated 2 mappings)
✅ Backend: DELETE /api/v1/account-mappings/{id} - delete mapping (deleted successfully)
✅ Frontend: Sidebar menu with 'Mapeamentos' link working
✅ Frontend: /mapeamentos page loads with correct title and description
✅ Frontend: CNPJ filter dropdown functioning properly
✅ Frontend: Search input filters results correctly (tested with '1019')
✅ Frontend: 'Novo Mapeamento' button opens modal
✅ Frontend: Create modal form validates and submits successfully
✅ Frontend: Checkbox selection for multiple items working
✅ Frontend: Bulk operations panel appears when items selected
✅ Frontend: Bulk update functionality working
✅ Frontend: Edit modal opens with correct disabled fields (CNPJ, conta_cliente)
✅ Frontend: Mobile responsive design with collapsible menu
✅ Frontend: Toggle all/none selection functionality
✅ Frontend: Refresh button working properly
✅ Frontend: Success messages displayed correctly
